description_long: This bench features a modern, minimalist design with a sturdy rectangular base in light gray, supporting a black slatted backrest and seat. The backrest consists of evenly spaced vertical slats framed by thicker horizontal and vertical beams, providing both structural integrity and visual appeal. The seat appears to be integrated with the backrest, forming a single, solid unit. The bench is mounted on a wide, flat platform that likely serves as a stable foundation, suggesting it is intended for permanent installation. The materials appear to be a combination of metal or painted wood for the bench structure and concrete for the base. Its clean lines and robust construction make it suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or public plazas.
description: A modern black slatted bench with a sturdy light gray rectangular base, featuring a solid backrest and integrated seat. The design is minimalist and robust, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full slatted backrest and the wide, flat base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the bench and the depth of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the backrest slats and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim structure and base depth.
attribute_leg_design: rectangular base with no visible individual legs
